title: Debug assertion codeVectorCompare: Assertion `0' failed
description:
mrigger added on 2019-12-30 21:01:34:
The following test case triggers a debug assertion error:
CREATE TABLE t0(c0 CHECK(((0, 0) > (0, c0))));
INSERT INTO t0(c0) VALUES(0) ON CONFLICT(c0) DO UPDATE SET c0 = 3; -- sqlite3.c:98717: codeVectorCompare: Assertion `0' failed.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(c1 Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY c1;
CREATE TABLE t2(c2 String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY c2;
CREATE TABLE t3(c3 Float32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY c3;
key_bug_features: INSERT ON CONFLICT with CHECK constraint triggers assertion failure
